title: Phrugia #5435
definition:
Phrygia = "dry, barren"

 1) a region in Asia Minor bounded by Bithynia, Galatia, Lycaonia,
    Pisidia, Lydia, Mysia and it contained the cities of Laodicea,
    Hierapolis, and Colosse
